arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen star confirms interest in La Liga return following past Barcelona talks
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen midfielder Aleix Garcia has confirmed interest in returning to La Liga in the future, having been the subject of summer transfer interest from Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal paid tribute to Lionel Messi in Las Palmas clash
arts.sum: Barcelona starlet Lamine Yamal on Saturday paid tribute to club icon Lionel Messi. As much came by way of the winger’s choice of footwear. Barcelona are of course currently locked…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star stretchered out of Las Palmas clash
arts.sum: Barcelona star Alejandro Balde was forced into a premature departure from the club’s meeting with Las Palmas, amid altogether concerning scenes. Hansi Flick’s troops are of course currently locked in…

arts.ttl: Confirmed: Hansi Flick springs surprise with Barcelona XI to face Las Palmas
arts.sum: The coaching staff at Barcelona have sprung a couple of surprises, by way of their personnel selection for the club’s meeting with Palmas. Barcelona are of course primed to return…

arts.ttl: Why are Barcelona wearing white shorts today against Las Palmas in LaLiga?
arts.sum: FC Barcelona are set to wear white shorts for their LaLiga game against Unión Deportiva Las Palmas on Saturday 30 November (8:00 a.m. ET / 5:00 a.m. PT.) and no, it’s not a tribute to Real Madrid. Believe it or not, the colour of their eternal rivals was in fact present on the earliest Barcelona kits, as the Catalans began their journey as a club with white shorts .

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Barcelona-Las Palmas: Hansi Flick to give young midfielder shot as Lamine Yamal returns
arts.sum: Barcelona are fresh off the back of their 125th anniversary celebrations on Friday night, and have an early start in the 14:00 CEST at Montjuic, with the reborn Las Palmas in town. The major team news for Barcelona is that Lamine Yamal and Ferran Torres are back in the squad. Despite doubts earlier in the […] The post Predicted Teams Barcelona-Las Palmas: Hansi Flick to give young midfielder shot as Lamine Yamal returns appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barça vs Las Palmas: Live Thread
arts.sum: The beautiful temporary home of the world’s greatest football club in the capital of Catalonia is the site of a big La Liga match between visitors Las Palmas and Barcelona, who come into this one looking to celebrate their 125th anniversary in style by returning to winning ways in the league after getting just one point from their last two games. We don’t have a lot of rules here, but there are a few things to keep in mind when joining our matchday threads:

arts.ttl: Barcelona Announces Special 'Cat' Mascot to Celebrate 125th Anniversary
arts.sum: At the club's 125th anniversary celebrations yesterday, Barcelona unveiled their commemorative mascot, 'CAT', inspired by the Catalonia cat and created from the club's crest to reflect Barça’s most iconic features.

On Saturday 30 November at 2pm CET the Estadi Olímpic Lluís Companys will be the venue for week 15 in La Liga which sees Barça take on UD Las Palmas, a game in which the fans will be able to celebrate the 125th anniversary of FC Barcelona. Such occasions warrant big things, and the club pulled out all the stops at Friday's Anniversary Gala at the Gran Teatre del Liceu, the city's iconic opera house that dates all the way back to 1837 and wouldn't even let two fires get in the way of its survival.

arts.ttl: Saturday's La Liga predictions including Barcelona vs. Las Palmas
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Barcelona vs. Las Palmas.
